note: Audio index: dialogue-line / practice-step ID -> pre-generated voice file (relative to the served root). Production files are mp3 (mono, 64-96kbps); the entries below are dependency-free WAV beep placeholders wired to prove the manifest->preload->play->replay->mute->fallback path. Lines NOT listed here surface in the dev-mode missing-audio report. IDs are the stable content IDs and are never renumbered.
